attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 51 AUC answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all AUC casebundles in this batch (n=51)

transform_flags: Age inferred as adult (~54) — no age is stated in the source note; please confirm on clinician review.
sex_at_birth has no source signal at all; a required schema field was set to 'male' as a placeholder inference and must be confirmed or corrected by the clinician reviewer.
Provisional case_id SPEC-ENDO-01-00201 — SEQ is provisional; ingest --reseq / maintainer to confirm or reassign within the SPEC-ENDO-01 bucket. Source note is AUC-016.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source clinician's in-person actions (IM hydrocortisone 100 mg, IV normal saline, physical positioning) were reprojected to the AI-appropriate behaviour — recognise, call 000, and instruct the carer to use a home emergency hydrocortisone injection kit if available. IV fluids and the confirmatory ACTH stimulation test are sealed as the correct hospital pathway, not AI-Doctor actions.

Presentation layer de-anchored: the source SOAP note was written by a clinician who already knew the diagnosis; 01/02 were rewritten as the spouse/patient would present before the crisis is named. Known Addison's disease and missed steroid doses are retained as legitimate patient-reported history (the patient knows their chronic diagnosis), not as the answer.

Clinician-measured vitals (BP 85/50, HR 118, Temp 38.2, SpO2 96%) reprojected: carer/home-device proxies placed in 01.objective_data_offered (verified:false, with reliability caveats); the clinician-measured refractory hypotension, tachycardia, hyperpigmentation and labs are sealed in 10/11.
Dose recorded (hydrocortisone 100 mg IM) is taken directly from the source note; no dose was synthesised. Adult patient — no paediatric dosing involved.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
